title: CH — Purchasing and Acquisition
description: This policy governs how the school district purchases goods and services, setting the rules and procedures for spending public funds on everything from supplies and equipment to contracts with outside vendors. It applies to district administrators and staff who are responsible for making purchasing decisions on behalf of the school system. For parents and community members, this policy matters because it helps ensure that taxpayer money is spent responsibly, transparently, and in accordance with state law.

timeline.summary: Policy CH (Purchasing and Acquisition) is referenced in multiple consent agenda items (V.H through V.K and V.L) as the governing authority under which the Superintendent is authorized to make purchases pursuant to awarded RFPs. No revisions to CH itself are indicated.
timeline.discussion: policy and a superintendent Facebook post
timeline.notes: CH is cited as existing authority, not as a policy under revision. Referenced in Consent Agenda items for RFPs 25-06-02, 25-06-04, 25-06-05, 25-07-01, and 25-08-01.
